reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio típica de la ruta, con una cafetería bastante buena y baños limpios. Su principal virtud: está justo a mitad de camino entre Rosario y Buenos Aires, punto ideal para una única parada.

(Translated by Google)
A typical roadside service station, with a pretty good café and clean restrooms. Its main advantage: it's right halfway between Rosario and Buenos Aires, an ideal spot for a single stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMmJQTHdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un clásico de la 9. Lindo, limpio, bien ubicado, solo es criticable el menú muy corto y sin opciones saludables.

(Translated by Google)
A classic on 9th Street. Nice, clean, well located, the only criticism is the very short menu with no healthy options.
